creator: shun.fbsd.pr@dropcut.net
text:
Created attachment 152877
Makefile with CPE information added

japanese/lynx-current has had vulnerabilities with a CPE identifier assigned[0]. This patch adds CPE information as suggested on the FreeBSD wiki[1].


[0] http://www.vuxml.org/freebsd/c01170bf-4990-11da-a1b8-000854d03344.html
[1] https://wiki.freebsd.org/Ports/CPE
